limitations: ai_investment_intensity: No specific dollar amounts or quantified AI-attributable spend disclosed in the excerpts; investment described qualitatively as requiring 'significant cash outflows' without AI-specific figures, capping score at 3.
capex_mentions: No explicit dollar figures tied specifically to AI investment found in the excerpts.

ai_narrative_concreteness: Some language remains promotional ('we believe', 'positions us well'), but multiple deployed use cases with operational detail (intismeran manufacturing algorithms, Dose ID GPT, enrollment forecasting) and implicit scale metrics (up to 1,000 mRNA lots/month, many patient batches) support score of 5.

ai_risk_disclosure_depth: Risk section material is present and detailed; scored 4 rather than 5 because no quantified risk exposure or formally named AI governance oversight body is cited in the excerpts.
